caption: A person's hands are shown opening a white and blue box on a table. The background is a white wall, and the table is covered with a black cloth featuring orange text and logos, including "SPYS CASEBREAKS". A small white object and a red object are also on the table. In the top-left frame, the person opens the top of the box. In the top-right frame, they pull the inner contents of the box upward. In the bottom-left frame, the person tips the box, revealing a white insert with the word "CLEARLY" printed in large letters and the word "AUTHENTIC" written smaller above it. In the bottom-right frame, the box is tilted further. A small inset video in the corner of each frame shows a man wearing a black t-shirt, with a logo that reads "SPYS CASEBREAKS.com".
